_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_24_note: Session 24 (2026-05-26): MRVL still in event_queue (earnings tonight May 27 post-close — still cannot process). ANET added to event_queue for -10.7% price move ($154→$137.53), then processed as Phase 2 deep session (event-driven). Key findings: (1) ANET MoS -17.6%→-7.7%, Rec SELL/AVOID→HOLD; JPMorgan conference: 54% actual shipment growth; supply>demand confirmed; (2) MU CEO: filling 50-67% of demand; first ever 5-year LTA signed; HBM4 volume production for Vera Rubin; (3) TSMC employee bonus cut 15% despite 58% profit jump; Samsung-style strike threat; no formal union (low near-term risk); (4) Taiwan #5 global market cap; NVDA to surpass Apple as #1 TSMC customer. Phase 1b gate OPEN and ZERO FINDS (6th consecutive) — self-improvement executed: gate changed % 3 → % 6 in CLAUDE.md. Phase 1c gate OPEN — no new candidates (power infrastructure as emerging bottleneck noted). Samsung vote closes May 27 10am KST — not yet resolved. ANET removed from event_queue after processing. Next session (25): ABSOLUTE PRIORITY: MRVL Q1 FY2027 earnings post-close May 27 — search results FIRST; update story_narrative in valuation/inputs/MRVL.json; run python3 valuation/dcf_model.py MRVL; update dashboard IV/MoS/Rec; remove MRVL from event_queue. Also check Samsung union vote result. Phase 1b gated (25%6=1). Phase 1c gated (25%6=1).
